data.title: VinFast Achieves Record EV Deliveries in Vietnam for February 2025
data.description:
VinFast Auto ( (VFS) ) has shared an announcement.

In February 2025, VinFast Auto Ltd. delivered over 12,500 electric vehicles in Vietnam, contributing to a total of more than 22,800 deliveries in the first two months of the year. This achievement underscores VinFast’s leading position in the Vietnamese market, with a notable 20% increase in sales from January, driven by the popularity of models such as the VF 3, VF 5, and VF 6.

More about VinFast Auto

VinFast Auto Ltd. operates in the automotive industry, specializing in the production and distribution of electric vehicles. The company is based in Hai Phong City, Vietnam, and focuses on maintaining a strong market presence in the domestic Vietnamese market.

data.title: PBF Energy Announces Leadership Transition in 2025
data.description:
An announcement from PBF Energy ( (PBF) ) is now available.

On March 10, 2025, PBF Energy announced the transition of Thomas J. Nimbley from Executive Chairman to non-executive Chairman of the Board, effective July 1, 2025, following his retirement from the executive role on June 30, 2025. Nimbley, who has been pivotal in the company’s growth from a start-up to a major independent refiner, will continue to serve on the Board, assuming his re-election at the 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. This transition reflects PBF Energy’s strategic leadership continuity and acknowledges Nimbley’s significant contributions to the company’s expansion and market positioning.

More about PBF Energy

PBF Energy Inc. is one of the largest independent refiners in North America, operating oil refineries and related facilities in California, Delaware, Louisiana, New Jersey, and Ohio. The company focuses on safe, reliable, and environmentally responsible operations, providing a rewarding workplace for employees, and delivering superior returns to investors. PBF Energy is also a 50% partner in the St. Bernard Renewables joint venture, which is dedicated to producing next-generation sustainable fuels.

YTD Price Performance: -23.19%

Average Trading Volume: 2,567,323

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.32B

data.title: Lippo Malls Indonesia Retail Trust Halts Scheduled Distribution on Perpetual Securities
data.description:
Lippo Malls Indonesia Retail ( (SG:D5IU) ) just unveiled an update.

Lippo Malls Indonesia Retail Trust has announced that it will not pay the scheduled distribution for its S$140,000,000 Perpetual Securities due on 27 March 2025. This decision activates dividend stopper provisions, restricting the trust from making any distributions or payments on its units or other securities until certain conditions are met, potentially impacting investor returns and financial strategies.

More about Lippo Malls Indonesia Retail

Lippo Malls Indonesia Retail Trust operates in the retail real estate industry, focusing on managing and developing retail mall properties in Indonesia. The company is structured as a trust and is managed by LMIRT Management Ltd.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $86.66M

data.title: Leadership Changes at Metallurgical Corporation of China Ltd.
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Metallurgical Corporation of China Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1618) ).

Metallurgical Corporation of China Ltd. announced the resignation of Mr. Zhou Jichang as an independent non-executive director, effective immediately, after serving for six years. His departure leads to a reshuffle in the board’s committees, with Ms. Zhou Guoping being appointed as the chairlady of the Nomination Committee and a member of the Remuneration and Appraisal Committee, indicating a strategic shift in the company’s governance structure.

More about Metallurgical Corporation of China Ltd. Class H

Metallurgical Corporation of China Ltd. is a prominent player in the metallurgical industry, focusing on engineering and construction services, natural resources exploitation, and equipment manufacturing. The company is known for its significant contributions to the development of infrastructure and industrial projects, particularly within China.

data.title: Rama Phosphates Announces Postal Ballot for Shareholder Approval
data.description:
An update from Rama Phosphates Limited ( (IN:RAMAPHO) ) is now available.

Rama Phosphates Limited announced a postal ballot notice seeking shareholder approval for certain resolutions through remote e-voting. This move is part of the company’s compliance with SEBI’s listing regulations, and the outcome could impact the company’s governance and operational strategies. The notice was published in major newspapers, indicating the company’s commitment to transparency and regulatory adherence.

More about Rama Phosphates Limited

Rama Phosphates Limited operates in the chemical industry, primarily manufacturing fertilizers and chemicals. The company’s product range includes SSP Fertilizer, Sulphuric Acid, Oleum, Chlorosulphonic Acid, Edible Soya Oil, Soya De Oiled Cake, Lecithin, and various micronutrients, with a market focus on agriculture and chemical sectors.

data.title: Cairn Homes Sees Major Shareholding Shift with Capital Group’s Increased Stake
data.description:
An update from Cairn Homes ( (GB:CRN) ) is now available.

Cairn Homes Plc announced a change in its major shareholding, with The Capital Group Companies, Inc. increasing its voting rights to over 6.00%. This acquisition signifies a notable shift in shareholder dynamics, potentially impacting the company’s governance and strategic decisions. The increase in voting rights by a significant shareholder like Capital Research and Management Company may influence Cairn Homes’ future operational strategies and market positioning.

More about Cairn Homes

Cairn Homes Plc operates in the residential property development industry, focusing on building and selling homes in Ireland. The company is known for its commitment to quality construction and sustainable development practices, catering primarily to the Irish housing market.

data.title: On the Beach Group PLC Executes Share Buyback to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
On The Beach ( (GB:OTB) ) has shared an announcement.

On the Beach Group PLC announced a share buyback program, purchasing 300,000 of its own shares for cancellation, resulting in a reduction of its issued share capital to 157,878,228 shares. This move is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value, reflecting a proactive approach to financial management within the travel sector.

More about On The Beach

On the Beach Group PLC operates in the travel industry, specializing in providing beach holiday packages. The company focuses on offering affordable travel options primarily through online platforms, catering to customers seeking vacation deals.

data.title: Alternative Income REIT Plc Announces Share Sale by Glenstone Property
data.description:
Alternative Income REIT Plc ( (GB:AIRE) ) just unveiled an update.

Alternative Income REIT Plc has announced the sale of shares by Glenstone Property plc, a person closely associated with Adam C Smith. The transactions involved the sale of 160,000 ordinary shares at varying prices, conducted on the London Stock Exchange between March 7 and March 11, 2025. This notification highlights the ongoing management of shareholdings within the company, which may impact investor perceptions and the company’s stock market performance.

Alternative Income REIT Plc operates in the real estate investment trust industry, focusing on generating income through a diversified portfolio of properties. The company primarily invests in UK-based assets, aiming to provide shareholders with regular income and capital growth.

data.title: Keppel Infrastructure Trust Issues Units for Base Fee Payment
data.description:
Keppel Infrastructure ( (SG:A7RU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Keppel Infrastructure Fund Management Pte. Ltd., the trustee-manager of Keppel Infrastructure Trust, announced the issuance of 1,646,787 units at S$0.4472 per unit as part of the base fee payment for the period from 1 July 2024 to 31 December 2024. This issuance represents 6.0% of the base fee, with the remaining 94.0% paid in cash, and reflects the trust’s ongoing commitment to its structured fee payment strategy as outlined in its trust deed.

More about Keppel Infrastructure

Keppel Infrastructure Trust (KIT) operates as a business trust in Singapore, focusing on infrastructure investments. It is managed by Keppel Infrastructure Fund Management Pte. Ltd., which oversees its portfolio of essential infrastructure assets.

data.title: Kam Hing International Schedules Board Meeting for Financial Review
data.description:
Kam Hing International Holdings Limited ( (HK:2307) ) has shared an announcement.

Kam Hing International Holdings Limited has announced a board meeting scheduled for March 27, 2025, to discuss and approve the company’s final results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The meeting will also consider the recommendation of a final dividend and address any other business matters, indicating a routine review of financial performance and potential shareholder returns.

More about Kam Hing International Holdings Limited

Kam Hing International Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily engaged in the textile industry. It focuses on the production and distribution of textile products, catering to various market segments.
